commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The code and proof are ready for normal review, but a maintainer should explicitly confirm the fallback-only model visibility policy before merge.; Cleared: The patch introduces no new dependency, workflow, permission, secret-storage, package-resolution, download, or supply-chain surface. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the GitHub Copilot provider to merge live-discovered models ahead of bounded static fallback rows, adds a static catalog hook, and expands regression coverage for disabled, failed, and duplicate discovery cases.

PR surface: Source +42, Tests +91. Total +133 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked issue provides a real-account user path where a newer entitled model is returned by Copilot and callable but hidden from OpenClaw listing/picker surfaces, and the supplied after-fix live output exercises the changed discovery path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The code and proof are ready for normal review, but a maintainer should explicitly confirm the fallback-only model visibility policy before merge.

target.title: fix(github-copilot): prefer live model catalog
